message: Rewrite beads page with native viewer and Frankenstein-themed viewer styles Beads page rewrite (app/beads/page.tsx): - Replaced the old multi-section layout (stats bar + sidebar + iframe viewer + legend + how-it-works explanation) with a clean three-section design: cinematic header, native BeadsView component, "What are Beads?" explainer, and CTA - Fixed orphaned closing tags from prior edits - Removed duplicate VIEWER_REPO constant declaration - Added missing imports: cn, NeuralPulse, FrankenGlitch, BeadsView Native beads viewer (components/beads/beads-view.tsx): - New client component that renders the beads dependency graph natively in React using react-force-graph and sql.js - Loads the beads SQLite database, parses tasks/dependencies, and renders an interactive force-directed graph - Node coloring by status, hover tooltips, click-to-select Beads viewer theme (public/beads-viewer/): - index.html: Hidden embedded navigation header (was showing redundant nav when embedded in the Next.js page) - styles.css: Replaced Dracula dark theme with Frankenstein glassmorphic theme — bg #020a02, green-500 accents, glass secondary backgrounds with backdrop-blur Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
